propositions: Remove HMAC signing and verification for the op-cert kinds plan-review and completion-verifier so neither resolves the HMAC-SHA256 scheme in registry.POLICY.
Delete the HMAC branch in signing.sign_manifest for op-cert kinds while leaving compute_signature and .signing-key intact for non-op-cert consumers.

Pre-existing HMAC attestations for these kinds must read as not-certified post-contract, preserved in the event log and never rewritten, with re-issue via re-running the gate to mint an Ed25519 op-cert.
Provide a migration artifact docs/migrations/hmac-opcert-removal.md with Expand and Contract sections plus cutover upgrade-order and re-issue procedures.
The authorship kind and other non-op-cert HMAC consumers must remain untouched and continue to verify.

Work is blocked on a producer-key design fork (local per-environment Ed25519 signing vs trusted ee0b server signing) that must be resolved before removal, gated by verifying the asymmetric producer path is present.
